import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(sorted, x)
    sorted
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in sorted
      if not inserted and x < y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end
for x in b
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
